# Nombre del reto
>Picker III

---
# Descripción
>Can you figure out how this program works to get the flag
>Connect to the program with netcat:
>`$ nc saturn.picoctf.net 55907`
>The program's source code can be downloaded [here](https://artifacts.picoctf.net/c/524/picker-III.py).

---
# Solución
Entramos y colocamos los siguientes valores:
- 1
- 3
- read_variables
- win
- 1
- 2
Lo cual nos dará la flag en [hexadecimal](https://toolbox.itsec.tamu.edu/#recipe=From_Hex('Auto')&).

---
# Flag del reto
>picoCTF{7h15_15_wh47_w3_g37_w17h_u53r5_1n_ch4rg3_c20f5222}
